THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO FEDERAL CREDIT UNION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT INGRAM, COREY ELLIOT, YVETTE A $820.70 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $865.70, DEFENDANTS COREY INGRAM AND YVETTE A. ELLIOT JOINTLY SEVERALLY SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO FEDERAL CREDIT UNION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $820.70 FILED BY SAN FRANCISCO FEDERAL CREDIT UNION AS TO DEFENDANT INGRAM, COREY ELLIOT, YVETTE A ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-24-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
